characters.name: Aaron Brooks
characters.description: Aaron BrooksMVBiographical InformationNationalityAfro-Asian AmericanSpeciesHumanGenderMaleHair colorBrownEye colorBrownStatusAliveAffiliation InformationAlliesSinghEvgenij Medov†Evelyn Matemavi†Helen Karsten†Cejudo†IwiKongEnemiesDeath JackalsSirenjawSwamp LocustSkullcrawlersWalter R. Riccio†Mother LonglegsRelationshipsHouston Brooks(Father)San Lin(Mother)AffiliationsMonarchCurrent occupationMonarchsecurity officerProduction InformationFirst appearanceSkull Island: The Birth of KongLast appearanceKong: Skull Island Cinematic AdventureAaron Brooksis a character created byLegendary Pictureswho made his first appearance in the2017MonsterVersecomic book series,Skull Island: The Birth of Kong. When first introduced, Aaron is very reckless to the point of defying his father's insistence thatSkull Islandbe kept a secret. Throughout the year he spends on Skull Island, he becomes repeatedly frustrated at not getting concrete assurance thatKongis capable of protecting humanity. Despite his recklessness, however, he genuinely cares about his crew and is willing to delay his "communion" with Kong to ensure their safety. When first introduced, Aaron is very reckless to the point of defying his father's insistence thatSkull Islandbe kept a secret. Throughout the year he spends on Skull Island, he becomes repeatedly frustrated at not getting concrete assurance thatKongis capable of protecting humanity. Despite his recklessness, however, he genuinely cares about his crew and is willing to delay his "communion" with Kong to ensure their safety. After being told the story of Kong's birth and the loss of his parents by Riccio, he displays a softer side, somberly realizing that Kong is an orphan, rather than just an animal/savage brute as he previously believed. At the very end of his "mission", Aaron has matured greatly, as he now understands what his father was trying to tell him, nature strikes its own balance, and he knows that the one to blame for the deaths of his crew is himself, and he willingly stays on Skull Island to help theIwiclean up the mess he'd made.

characters.name: Adam Bindewald
characters.description: Adam BindewaldReiwaNomenclatureTitleSecond LieutenantBiographical InformationNationalityGermanSpeciesHumanGenderMaleAge21Hair colorBlondeEye colorBlueStatusDeceasedProduction InformationPortrayed byYuuki KajiFirst appearanceGodzilla: Planet of the MonstersLast appearanceGodzilla: The Planet Eater Adam Bindewald(アダム・ビンデバルト?)is a supporting protagonist in both the2017Godzillafilm,Godzilla: Planet of the Monstersand its2018sequelGodzilla: City on the Edge of Battleand a supporting antagonist inGodzilla: The Planet Eater. Adam is depicted with a pale complexion, blonde hair, and blue eyes. His body build is average. Adam's personality was briefly explored in the film, and he was shown to be generally positive, having expressed a positive reaction to the anti-Godzilla thesis, even in spite of all the skepticism regarding its efficiency.

characters.name: Akemi Togawa
characters.description: Akemi TogawaShowaBiographical InformationNationalityJapaneseSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleHair colorDark brownStatusAliveAffiliation InformationAlliesYuzo MajidaSandaEnemiesGairaRelationshipsPaul Stewart(boss) Akemi Togawa(戸川アケミ,Togawa Akemi?)is a scientist character in the1966Toho filmWar of the Gargantuas. Akemi was a scientist who studied the infantSanda, establishing the closest bond with the creature out of everyone on the research team. Years later, agreen monsterrises from the sea and begins to terrorize the area. She and her employer,Paul Stewart, see the monster's description in the newspaper and decide that it is a Gargantua, but Akemi refuses to believe that it is the same docile creature she knew. They are forced to report their findings to the military, whom they aid in devising strategies to defeat the monster. They eventually discover that there are two Gargantuas: the one responsible for attacking the ships, and a docile, mountain-dwelling creature. Her life is saved by the mountain Gargantua, who she recognizes as Sanda. Eventually, Gaira begins to terrorizeTokyo, and Sanda begins to follow him; knowing that he will be killed should he try to enter the city, Akemi tries to use her mother-like influence over Sandra to turn him away. Unfortunately, she fails, and the monsters proceed to battle throughout the city before they are destroyed in the ocean.

characters.name: Akira Ichinose
characters.description: Akira IchinoseShowaBiographical InformationNationalityJapaneseSpeciesHumanStatusAliveAffiliation InformationRelationshipsKatsura Mafune(Romantic Interest)Production InformationFirst appearanceTerror of Mechagodzilla Akira Ichinoseis a main protagonist in the1975Godzilla film,Terror of Mechagodzilla. When a submarine searching for the remains ofMechagodzillasinks at the hands of adinosaur, a group, including Ichinose, is called to discuss the matter. The dinosaur lead brings Ichinose to the home of once-great scientist,Shinzo Mafune. after arriving, it is revealed byMafune's daughterthat Dr. Mafune had died long before Ichinose's arrival. neither Ichinose or his partner believe her. later on, after the discovery of one of Dr. Mafune's old notebooks (labeled number 18) in the university library. Ichinose then calls Katsura Mafune to lunch to discuss the findings, but he unwittingly reveals INTERPOL's secrets for handling Titanosaurus.

characters.name: Akira Sakaki
characters.description: Akira SakakiReiwaBiographical InformationNationalityJapaneseSpeciesHumanGenderMaleStatusDeceasedAffiliation InformationEnemiesGodzillaRelationshipsUnnamed MotherHaruka Sakaki† (Wife)Haruo Sakaki† (Son)Production InformationPortrayed byKenichi Suzumura(JP)Danny Boston (EN)First appearanceGodzilla: Monster ApocalypseLast appearanceGodzilla: The Planet Eater Akira Sakaki(アキラ・サカキ?)was the father ofHaruo Sakaki. Introduced in the2017prequel novel,Godzilla: Monster Apocalypse, he was presumed killed along with his wife,Haruka SakakibyGodzilla, but he was later revealed to have survived inGodzilla: Project Mechagodzilla. Akira appeared briefly during theGodzillafilm,Godzilla: Planet of the Monsters, and appeared in the2018film,Godzilla: The Planet Eater.

characters.name: Akira Yuki
characters.description: Akira YukiHeiseiBiographical InformationNationalityJapaneseSpeciesHumanAffiliation InformationRelationshipsTakaki Aso(Former Superior)Chinatsu Gondo(Colleague)Production InformationFirst appearanceGodzilla vs. SpaceGodzilla Major Akira Yuki(結城 晃,Yūki Akira?)is aG-Forcesoldier and the main human protagonist in the1994GodzillafilmGodzilla vs. SpaceGodzilla. He is committed to getting revenge onGodzillafor the death of best friend, ColonelGoro Gondoin the filmGodzilla vs. Biollante. Erratic and shabby, Yuki's vendetta against Godzilla has alienated him from many of his colleagues. He is inventor of the "Yuki's Special," which is no more than a bullet filled with blood coagulant fired at Godzilla from an ordinary rifle.

characters.name: Al Willis
characters.description: Al WillisMVBiographical InformationNationalityAmericanSpeciesHumanGenderMaleHair colorBrown (graying)Eye colorBrownAffiliation InformationAlliesMonarchPrevious occupationSenatorProduction InformationPortrayed byRichard JenkinsFirst appearanceKong: Skull IslandLast appearanceKong: Skull Island Al Willisis a character who appeared in the2017MonsterVersefilm,Kong: Skull Island. Willis was in his office when he was visited byMonarchoperativesWilliam RandaandHouston Brooks. They persuaded him to fund a joint expedition with Landsat to an uncharted location in the South Pacific calledSkull Island. Willis was initially reluctant but after being convinced about beating the Russians who were about to launch a similar operation to the island, he agreed and granted Monarch a military escort at Randa's behest.

characters.name: Alan Jonah
characters.description: Alan JonahMVNomenclatureNickname(s)ShakespeareBiographical InformationBirthplaceRedditch, Worchestershire, England, UK[1]NationalityBritishSpeciesHumanGenderMaleHair colorWhiteEye colorBlueStatusAliveAffiliation InformationAlliesAsaj[2]Asher Jonah†Sergeant Baker[2]Lieutenant Bottin[2]Sergeant Travis[3]Corporal WinstonWalter Simmons†Stacy MartinEnemiesMonarchEmma Russell†Madison RussellLahamuDavid MartinGodzillaTiamatRelationshipsLindy Jonah † (daughter)[4][5]Previous occupationBritish Army Colonel and MI6 special agentCurrent occupationEco-terrorist and mercenary group leaderProduction InformationPortrayed byCharles DanceLarry OblanderFirst appearanceGodzilla: AftershockLast appearanceKong: Survivor Instinct Alan Jonahis a major antagonist in theMonsterVersefranchise, serving as the secondary antagonist of the2019MonsterVersegraphic comic bookGodzilla: Aftershock, and of the2019filmGodzilla: King of the Monsters, the unseen overarching antagonist ofGodzilla vs. Kong,and the main antagonist of the game,Kong: Survivor Instinct. Jonah is a former British Army colonel and MI6 officer who, after being maddened into misanthropy by decades of firsthand war experience and the tragic murder of his daughter, became an international paramilitary eco-terrorist obsessed with restoring what he perceived to be the natural order to the detriment of humanity, causing the Titans to draw his interest after they were revealed to the world. Jonah is a cold-blooded killer, who conducts himself with stone-faced professionalism and mercilessness when massacring the Monarch staff who are between him and his objective. He's shown to be a highly stoic individual who near-constantly projects an icy and composed demeanor, even after he's genuinely shaken by the death of Asher; and when he does raise his voice, it's almost always in a controlled manner. The extent of Jonah's unflappable demeanor is shown when he reacts with shock but complete composure to Ghidorah unexpectedly awakening all the dormant Titans simultaneously. He is deathly-quiet when he doesn't have any real reason to speak, but when he does speak, he displays a dry wit and a deadpan sense of humor. He doesn't mince his words, whether he is talking to an adult or a child. After the tragic loss of his daughter Lindy[4][5]and seeing the worst in humanity firsthand over his decades-long military career, Jonah took on an extreme misanthropic mentality, and now he believes that humans don't deserve to live because of mankind's escalating destructive tendencies; believing that human nature only gets ever worse and worse with time and progress. He believes that "evolution isn't always right", citing the mere existence of humanity as well as the basic human drive to care for others of their species regardless of said species' faults (an impulse which Jonah has largely divorced himself from) as such a mistake[6]. His gritty sense of realism and awareness of how unpleasant his and Emma's eco-terrorist plan will be shows

characters.name: Alexandra Springer
characters.description: Alexandra SpringerTriBiographical InformationNationalityAmericanSpeciesHumanAffiliation InformationRelationshipsNoneProduction InformationFirst appearanceGodzilla: The Seriesepisode 24:S.C.A.L.E. Alexandra Springeris the main antagonist in the1999episode ofGodzilla: The Series:S.C.A.L.E.. Alexandra Springer was the leader of the Servants of Creatures Arriving Late to Earth, or S.C.A.L.E, a Mutation-focused splinter group of a reputable animal rights group that became an Eco-Terrorist group thanks to Alexandra's extensive Military training. Eventually she orchestrated an attack onMonster Islandto set all of the monsters on it free. She learns of Monster Island's location by putting a tracker onAudrey Timmonds, who stowed away on a ship bound for it. She and the rest of S.C.A.L.E. then go to the island and use gas grenades to knock out the guards on the way to the control room where Alexandra turned off all of the island's security measures such as the barriers keeping the monsters in separate habitats and their power inhibiting collars that kept them from destroying the buildings. She then called Audrey to the control room to film a documentary on S.C.A.L.E. and their ideals. Audrey saves Alexandra's life when theGiant BatandSkeeteracrash into it, but She is intent on letting the Mutations take her life if it will please them. While the two wait in the wreckage of the control room, they are found by Military forces. This causes Alexandra to spring for the island's self-destruct button, but before she can push it she is captured and arrested. Alexandra and Audrey meet again while she is in prison and the reporter tries to ask her about a compact disk she gave her before she was taken away. Alexandra tells her that it is the security camera feed from Monster Island, and that it has their entire conversation on it, and she urges Audrey to use it to spread the word about the cause, and she is taken back to her cell. Seemingly unbeknownst to Alexandra, Audrey decides not to air the story and destroys the tape containing it by throwing it into a fireplace, declaring "some stories are better leftuntold".

Audrey saves Alexandra's life when theGiant BatandSkeeteracrash into it, but She is intent on letting the Mutations take her life if it will please them. While the two wait in the wreckage of the control room, they are found by Military forces. This causes Alexandra to spring for the island's self-destruct button, but before she can push it she is captured and arrested. Alexandra and Audrey meet again while she is in prison and the reporter tries to ask her about a compact disk she gave her before she was taken away. Alexandra tells her that it is the security camera feed from Monster Island, and that it has their entire conversation on it, and she urges Audrey to use it to spread the word about the cause, and she is taken back to her cell. Seemingly unbeknownst to Alexandra, Audrey decides not to air the story and destroys the tape containing it by throwing it into a fireplace, declaring "some stories are better leftuntold".

characters.name: Allie
characters.description: AllieIDWBiographical InformationNationalityAmericanSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleProduction InformationFirst appearanceGodzilla: Kingdom of Monsters Issue 5Last appearanceGodzilla: Rulers of Earth Issue 25 Allieis a young girl with a prominent role in the comic SeriesGodzilla: Kingdom of Monsters. In the series she is the near constant companion ofSergeant Steven Woodsafter the lost of her family. Allie is introduced when her family is evacuating during Godzilla's invasion of America. While traffic was jammed up on the road Godzilla attacks the jam, in the process killing Allie's Parents and older brother.

characters.name: Andrew Russell
characters.description: Andrew RussellMVBiographical InformationDate of birth2002NationalityAmericanSpeciesHumanGenderMaleAge12Hair colorDark brownEye colorGreyStatusDeceasedAffiliation InformationRelationshipsGeorge Russell (Paternal Grandfather)Gene Williams (Maternal Grandfather)Josephine Williams (Maternal Grandmother)Mark Russell(Father)Emma Russell† (Mother)Cassidy Russell (Paternal Aunt)[1]Madison Russell(Sister)Unnamed paternal cousins[1]Production InformationPortrayed byTyler CrumleyFirst appearanceGodzilla: AftershockLast appearanceGodzilla: King of the Monsters Andrew Russellwas the late son ofMarkandEmma Russell, and the older brother ofMadison Russell. In2002, Andrew was born toMonarchscientists Drs. Mark and Emma Russell.Five years later, he gained a sister named Madison. The Russells lived a mostly happy and carefree life inBoston, but eventually moved toSan Franciscodue to Emma receiving a job offer there. In2014, San Francisco became the battleground betweenGodzillaand a breeding pair ofMUTOs, two prehistoric superspecies that were rivaled with each other. Andrew was found dead after being crushed by debris in the ensuing battle, though the rest of his family managed to survive.[2]Andrew's death created a great strain in Mark and Emma's relationship, with the two divorcing and Emma taking Madison. Andrew's death also caused Mark to develop an intense opposition towards Godzilla and all the other Titans, and quit Monarch. Emma however couldn't recover from the loss and researched about Godzilla and the Titans bringing balance back to the planet which eventually led her to align with Alan Jonah in order to reawaken all the Titans to make sure her son didn't die in vain.

Andrew's death also caused Mark to develop an intense opposition towards Godzilla and all the other Titans, and quit Monarch. Emma however couldn't recover from the loss and researched about Godzilla and the Titans bringing balance back to the planet which eventually led her to align with Alan Jonah in order to reawaken all the Titans to make sure her son didn't die in vain.

characters.name: Anna Otonashi
characters.description: Anna OtonashiMillBiographical InformationNationalityJapaneseSpeciesHumanAffiliation InformationRelationshipsMiyuki Otonashi(Sister)Douglas Gordon(Lover)Candy(Dog)Production InformationPortrayed byMaki MizunoFirst appearanceGodzilla: Final Wars Anna Otonashi(音無 杏奈,Otonashi An'na?)is a human protagonist from the2004Godzillafilm,Godzilla: Final Wars. She is left out of the action aboard theGotengoso that there could be a human left if they failed. Anna works for a Television company called Nitto TV and interviews people on what can be assumed is her own show. She is the first person to realize that one of the people she had interviewed was not human, on account of how he did not blink. She is shown to be intelligent, using her own dog, and letting the Xilien disguised as Secretary General Daigo believe that it was his dog in order to expose him. Her role in the film is minuscule after theGotengodeparts, and she only re-appears at the end. Anna could easily be described as being intrepid and down-to-earth, as these qualities would more easily allow her to identify the Xiliens in disguise. She also seems the most fearful, or most human member of the cast, as she is frightened whenDouglas Gordonshoots a Xilien next to her, and runs for the protection of the group afterXshoots his superior in the head.

characters.name: Anthony Hicks
characters.description: Anthony HicksTriBiographical InformationNationalityAmericanSpeciesHumanProduction InformationFirst appearanceGODZILLA Colonel Anthony Hicks, laterMajor, is a supporting character in the1998filmGODZILLAand inGodzilla: The Series. Hicks was a colonel in theUnited Statesmilitary and was assigned to investigate agiant creaturecoming ashore inPanama. There, he metNiko Tatopoulos, who studied one of the creature's footprints. Eventually, the monster came ashore inNew Yorkand caused severe damage throughout the city. Hicks was placed in charge of operations to destroy the monster, later dubbedGodzillaby the media. Under Hicks' command, the military encountered Godzilla in the city multiple times, with the beast eluding their attacks and disappearing. When classified information about the monster was reported by the media due to Nick Tatopoulos' ex-girlfriendAudrey Timmondsstealing it from him, Hicks had Nick kicked from the anti-Godzilla task force. Eventually, Godzilla was chased into the Hudson River by the military, where he was seemingly killed by torpedoes. However, Hicks later saw a news broadcast live from Madison Square Garden, where hundreds ofBaby Godzillashad hatched and were roaming around. Hicks told Nick, Audrey, Victor "Animal" Palotti, andPhilippe Roachéto evacuate the arena, and ordered twoF-18 Hornetsto blow it up. Afterwards, the still-living adult Godzilla appeared from underground and began to chase Nick and the others across the city. Hicks had them lure Godzilla to theBrooklyn Bridge, where the creature was finally killed by three F-18 Hornets. With Godzilla dead, Hicks' mission was complete.

characters.name: Anthony Martinez
characters.description: Anthony MartinezMVNomenclatureTitleStaff SergeantBiographical InformationBirthplaceBrooklyn, New York, USANationalityAmericanSpeciesHumanGenderMaleHeight5' 9"Hair colorBlackEye colorBrownStatusAliveAffiliation InformationAlliesDiane FosterJackson BarnesLauren GriffinIshiro Serizawa†Vivienne Graham†Mark RussellIlene ChenWilliam StenzSam ColemanRick StantonEmma Russell†Madison RussellGodzillaMothraEnemiesAlan JonahAsher Jonah†Ghidorah†RelationshipsAl Martinez(Father)Angela Martinez(Mother)Previous occupationFEMA reservistCurrent occupationG-TeamsoldierProduction InformationPortrayed byAnthony RamosFirst appearanceGodzilla: King of the MonstersLast appearanceGodzilla: King of the Monsters Staff Sergeant Anthony Martinezis a soldier character who first appeared in the2019MonsterVersefilm,Godzilla: King of the Monsters. Anthony's parents instilled in him the values of community and looking out for other people, so he considers helping others more than just a job. Anthony is the type of selfless person who will run into a burning building when everyone else runs the opposite direction. As a part of the G-Team, he wants to test his skills and do his part in a world more endangered than before with the emergence of Titans. Martinez is also somewhat of a snarker akin to his companion Jackson, finding grim hilarity in his own race's self-destructive impulsiveness. Extently seen when voicing how humanity pretty much critically injured the only one capable of stopping an extraterrestrial dominant predator from pulling their planet inside out in a blind panic. Anthony's parents instilled in him the values of community and looking out for other people, so he considers helping others more than just a job. characters.name: Asher Jonah
characters.description: Asher JonahMVNomenclatureNickname(s)AshBiographical InformationNationalityAmericanSpeciesHumanGenderMaleHair colorBrownEye colorBlueStatusDeceasedAffiliation InformationAlliesAlan JonahAsajSergeant TravisCorporal WinstonSergeant BakerLieutenant BottinEnemiesMonarchEmma Russell†Madison RussellPrevious occupationSoldierCurrent occupationMember of Alan Jonah's eco-terrorist groupProduction InformationPortrayed byJonathan HowardFirst appearanceGodzilla: King of the Monsters - The Official Movie NovelizationLast appearanceGodzilla: King of the Monsters Asher Jonahis a soldier character who appeared in the2019MonsterVersefilm,Godzilla: King of the Monsters. Asher shares many of Jonah's sentiments such as there always being casualties in war and that evolution is sometimes wrong. Asher is thoroughly loyal to Jonah and his cause to create a better world, saying that even though he wouldn't enjoy the deed, he would kill a thousand people if Jonah deems it necessary.[1] Asher shares many of Jonah's sentiments such as there always being casualties in war and that evolution is sometimes wrong. Asher is thoroughly loyal to Jonah and his cause to create a better world, saying that even though he wouldn't enjoy the deed, he would kill a thousand people if Jonah deems it necessary.[1]

characters.name: Astronaut Glenn
characters.description: Astronaut GlennShowaBiographical InformationNationalityAmericanSpeciesHumanStatusAliveAffiliation InformationRelationshipsMiss Namikawa(Lover)Production InformationFirst appearanceInvasion of Astro-Monster Astronaut Glennis a character in the1965GodzillafilmInvasion of Astro-Monster. Glenn was an astronaut for the World Space Authority flying to the recently discoveredPlanet Xwith his colleagueAstronaut Fuji. When the two arrived on Planet X, they were taken into an undergroundXiliencompound and were made to wait until they were introduced to theController of Planet X. The Controller informed the astronauts the reason his people could not live on the surface was because of a horrible space monster called "Monster Zero," which Glenn immediately recognized asKing Ghidorah. The Controller asked if the humans would give themGodzillaandRodanto combat Ghidorah in exchange for a cure for cancer. Glenn andFujireturned to earth and told the World Space Authority of theXiliens' offer.

characters.name: Asuka Okouchi
characters.description: Asuka OkouchiHeiseiBiographical InformationNationalityJapaneseSpeciesHumanAffiliation InformationRelationshipsKazuhito Kirishima(Love Interest)Current occupationESP Exploitation Institute PresidentProduction InformationPortrayed byYoshiko TanakaFirst appearanceGodzilla vs. BiollanteLast appearanceGodzilla vs. Biollante Asuka Okouchiis a supporting character in the1989Godzilla filmGodzilla vs. Biollante. Asuka is the president of the ESP exploitation institute, an organization which isolates people with Extrasensory Perception and tries to use their abilities to make advances in various fields of study.

characters.name: Audrey Burns
characters.description: Audrey BurnsMVNomenclatureTitleCaptianBiographical InformationNationalityAmericanSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleHair colorBrownEye colorBrownStatusAliveAffiliation InformationAlliesKongTam NassarJohanna EdwardsHouston BrooksGibsonDiggsZunigaNomuraEnemiesMother LonglegsDeath JackalsCamazotzCamazotz's minionsAffiliationsMonarchCurrent occupationFighter pilotProduction InformationFirst appearanceKingdom KongLast appearanceKingdom Kong Audrey Burnsis a character created byLegendary Pictureswho made her first appearance within the2021MonsterVersegraphic novel,Kingdom Kong. During her time in the US Air Force, Audrey was an open-hearted, cheerful person. While flying, she displayed a tendency towards recklessness, which led to dangerous situations. After the events in San Diego, Audrey suffered from severe guilt for having broken formation and thus surviving. Her guilty conscience also prevented her from visiting her friend Tam in the hospital for a long time. She suffered from nightmares and was afraid that Tam wouldn't recognize her. Only after the events did she find the courage to face everything.

characters.name: Audrey Timmonds
characters.description: Audrey TimmondsTriBiographical InformationNationalityAmericanSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleStatusAliveAffiliation InformationRelationshipsNiko Tatopoulos(Love Interest)Current occupationNewsroom assistant (formerly)ReporterProduction InformationPortrayed byMaria PitilloG98Paget BrewsterGTSFirst appearanceGodzillaLast appearanceGodzilla: The Series Audrey Timmondsis the deuteragonist of the1998film,Godzilla, who later reappears inGodzilla: The Seriesin a smaller role. Audrey was a woman who always dreamed of being a reporter. When she is first seen in film attempting to ask her boss for a promotion to reporter from her job as an administrative assistant, to which he tries to ask her out on an extra-marital date. This causes her to storm out of the building. she later meets some friends and co-workers at a restaurant where they tell her that she must toughen up to become successful in New York. At that moment she sees her college sweetheartNiko Tatopouloson TV regarding thelarge monsterseen earlier. She eventually tracks Tatopoulos down and reconnects with him at his research station, where he tells her of his research.
